choices: They go to school and Lisa's make up had worn off on the way to school
Thanks to the make up nobody noticed her acme
1.content: Wow look at my moustache, that's great Bart but I have bigger problems Lisa said right before Bart starts poking Lisa's face. What happens next?
1.title: Bart wakes up with a moustache and Lisa with acme

info.brief_description: After drinking a new milk Bart and Lisa hit puberty and Maggie gets strong.
info.description: It all started when Simpson's ran out of milk and bought more but from a company they never heard about. Do the Simpson's kids respect the side effects of the milk or not?
